regional_cost_note: Whanganui builder rates are among the most affordable in NZ — $72–$98/hr. Great value market with a growing renovation scene.

businesses.name: The Task Masters
businesses.known_for: Residential building and handyman services across Whanganui and surrounding Manawatu/Rangitikei districts.

businesses.name: MJRD Building
businesses.known_for: Renovations, new builds, kitchens, bathrooms and decks by a licensed building practitioner with 8 years of experience.

businesses.name: EMJ Builders Limited
businesses.known_for: Family-owned business run by two brothers specialising in residential renovations, fencing, decking and cladding.
